name: Cyclamen the Rikka Fairy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シクラン
desc: You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up field, then target up to 2 Plant monsters you control; reduce their Level(s) by 2 until the end of this turn. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was Tributed and sent there this turn: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Cyclamen the Rikka Fairy" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up field, then target up to 2 Plant monsters you control; reduce their Level(s) by 2 until the end of this turn. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was Tributed and sent there this turn: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Cyclamen the Rikka Fairy" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up field, then target up to 2 Plant monsters you control; reduce their Level(s) by 2 until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Cyclamen the Rikka Fairy" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
